name: Uscreen
description: Uscreen — all-in-one video membership and OTT platform

seo.title: Uscreen — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Uscreen: Uscreen — all-in-one video membership and OTT platform

when_to_use: Video membership and subscription platform for content creators
OTT apps on iOS, Android, and smart TVs from one platform
Monetized video courses and live streams with paywall
White-label video community for fitness and education brands
Replacing Vimeo OTT with more control over video monetization

pros: All-in-one OTT with memberships, apps, payments
Native apps for Roku, Apple TV, Fire TV
Community features and live events built in
cons: Monthly fee plus revenue share on some tiers
Not a developer platform — SaaS only
review.verdict: Complete membership-video business-in-a-box — ideal for creators, wrong fit for dev tools context.
review.best_for: Course creators and fitness/education brands monetizing video memberships across TV apps.
review.not_for: Developers embedding video in custom products.
